ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_name" TEXT /* Name of the match (e.g., Qualification 1) */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the match */,
  "red_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first red team participating in the match */,
  "red_team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second red team participating in the match */,
  "blue_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first blue team participating in the match */,
  "blue_team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second blue team participating in the match */,
  "red_score" TEXT /* Score of the red teams */,
  "blue_score" INTEGER /* Score of the blue teams */,
  "match_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match type */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the match */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_red_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("red_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_blue_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("blue_team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_red_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("red_team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_blue_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("blue_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_match_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_type_id") REFERENCES match_types ("match_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_number" INTEGER /* Number of the team */,
  "school" TEXT /* School or organization the team represents */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "coach_email" TEXT /* Email of the team coach */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team was registered */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the team information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the tournament */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tournament was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the tournament information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_types" (
  "match_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match type */,
  "match_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the match type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the match type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the match */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule entry (e.g., confirmed, tentative) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the schedule entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_schedules_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_schedules_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "red_score" TEXT /* Score of the red teams */,
  "blue_score" INTEGER /* Score of the blue teams */,
  "red_team_score_details" TEXT /* Detailed scoring information for the red team */,
  "blue_team_score_details" TEXT /* Detailed scoring information for the blue team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the score was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the score was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, judge, team captain) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the user account information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
